channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Reasons Why Women Experience Hair Thinning
How HIV Affects Older Adults Differently
Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: I Tried RentAHuman, Where AI Agents Hired Me to Hype Their AI Startups
item.description: Rather than offering a revolutionary new approach to gig work, RentAHuman is filled with bots that just want me to be another cog in the AI hype machi...

item.title: The Best Hearing Aids of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: These WIRED-tested devices will help you hear sounds more clearly. Never miss out on a dinner conversation again.

item.title: Good News in History, February 12
item.description: 25 years ago today, the Near Earth Asteroid Rendezvous (NEAR) – Shoemaker spacecraft successfully orbited and landed on the asteroid Eros 433, a first...

item.title: Many Adjustable Bed Frames Have a “Zero Gravity” Feature. I Tried It for a Week
item.description: I decided to try my adjustable bed frame’s “zero gravity” feature for a week. I wouldn’t do it again.

item.title: KYY X90G Quad Portable Monitor Extender Review: 3 More Screens
item.description: This accessory gives your laptop three extra displays—as long as you’re prepared to lug them around.

item.title: Alexa+ and Kindle Scribe Now Work Together With ‘Send to Alexa’
item.description: The new “Send to Alexa” feature lets you send Kindle Scribe notebooks to your Echo device with just a couple of taps.

item.title: Bird Droppings Powered the Rise of this Little-Known Coastal Kingdom, Archaeologists Find
item.description: New archaeological evidence reveals that seabird guano—nutrient-rich bird droppings—may have the driver of behind the prosperity of the most influenti...

item.title: Southwest is adding Starlink Wi-Fi to its planes: 300 jets to get fast tech in 2026
item.description: Southwest Airlines will begin adding Starlink Wi-Fi to its aircraft in the coming months, which will remain free to its loyalty members.

item.title: The best Mediterranean cruises for every type of traveler
item.description: Learn which cruise lines offer a variety of European options — whether you’re a culture vulture, beach lover, history buff or family traveler.

item.title: The 11 best places to see cherry blossoms across the US this spring
item.description: From Washington, D.C., to Portland, Oregon, here's where you can see cherry blossoms in the U.S. this spring.

item.title: Comparing Southwest card benefits: The Southwest Plus, Premier and Priority go head-to-head
item.description: A look at the differences among the three personal Southwest credit cards, which have different ongoing benefits when flying with the airline.

item.title: United Quest Card review: A great mid-tier option for United loyalists
item.description: The United Quest Card comes with United Airlines benefits that frequent United flyers will appreciate. But is it the best card for you? Here's what to...

item.title: One Pan Cheeseburger Rice
item.description: Cheeseburger rice is everything you love about a juicy cheeseburger, made easy in one skillet. Hearty, cheesy, and packed with…

item.title: OpenAI disbands mission alignment team
item.description: The team's leader has been given a new role as OpenAI's chief futurist, while the other team members have been reassigned throughout the company.

item.title: AI inference startup Modal Labs in talks to raise at $2.5B valuation, sources say
item.description: General Catalyst is in talks to lead the round for the four-year-old startup, according to our sources.

item.title: Pet Sanctuary Takes in Overflow from Homeless Shelter Amid Unprecedented Cold Snap
item.description: A cat shelter in Green Bay has opened its doors to anyone seeking shelter from the Siberian temperatures pummeling the Midwest this week. Safe Haven P...

item.title: Heroic Neighbor Uses Sledgehammer to Rescue 85-year-old Woman in Wheelchair from House Fire
item.description: A good neighbor in Illinois has been hailed as a hero for using a sledgehammer to batter down the door of a burning building to rescue a wheelchair-bo...

item.title: Apple’s Siri revamp reportedly delayed… again
item.description: While the new Siri was expected to launch with the upcoming iOS 26.4 update in March, now, the changes are expected to roll out more slowly over time,...

item.title: Uber Eats launches AI assistant to help with grocery cart creation
item.description: Uber Eats launched a new AI feature, “Cart Assistant,” that can automatically add items to your cart based on text or image prompts.

item.title: xAI lays out interplanetary ambitions in public all-hands
item.description: On Wednesday, xAI took the rare step of publishing its full 45-minute all-hands presentation to the X platform, making it widely available.

item.title: Lost Painting by the ‘Illustrious Woman’ Painter of the Renaissance Surfaces in N. Carolina After 100 Years
item.description: A lost work by the most famous female artist of the Renaissance has surfaced at a North Carolina estate. The story of how Portrait of a Canon Regular ...

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)
item.description: While recently making our tahini cookies for what felt like the millionth time, we thought, Why not add chocolate to this party? The result was even b...

item.title: 3 Ingredient Cool Whip Candy
item.description: This 3 Ingredient Cool Whip Candy tastes just like a Three Musketeers Bar! Fluffy on the inside, smooth chocolate on…

item.title: Cajun Spaghetti (Louisiana Spaghetti)
item.description: This Cajun spaghetti is comforting like classic spaghetti but delivers a flavor packed Cajun kick with sausage and a creamy sauce. You’ll…

item.title: Chicken Schnitzel
item.description: You guys are obsessed with my Pork Schnitzel, so I knew I had to make a chicken version! Thin-pounded, lightly…

item.title: Marcella Hazan’s 3 Ingredient Tomato Sauce
item.description: Simple, classic, and downright magical, this iconic Marcella Hazan’s tomato sauce uses only 3 ingredients and proves that less is…

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: Best Gluten-Free Pizza in Naples: Top Pizzerias to Try
item.description: If you are gluten-free, you might assume that Naples, the birthplace of pizza, would be difficult, restrictive, or disappointing. The reality is the o...

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries
item.description: For many travellers, dinner feels like the main event. It is where expectations concentrate: the moment reserved for something special, social, or mem...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures
item.description: People often search for a “normal meal” when they arrive somewhere new. Something familiar enough to feel grounding, but local enough to feel authenti...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...

item.title: Tahini Hot Chocolate (Super Dreamy, Protein-Rich!)
item.description: If you’re looking for a decadent, elevated hot chocolate with wholesome ingredients, this one’s for you! We’ve been serving up this frothy, tahini-inf...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
